title: Oulu Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Oulu, with a Z-Score of -3.09. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Oulu are extremely cold, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 11.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 72%, and the wind speed is moderate at 9.7 km/h. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with no Cooling Degree Days (CDD) recorded, indicating no relief from the cold temperatures.
